notes: This artifact records only whether required environment variables are configured.
It never prints, decodes, hashes, or previews secret values.
Configured secrets still need their underlying private evidence to be reviewed before a completion gate can be accepted.

secrets.name: ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN
secrets.next_operator_action: Set the ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN repository secret before release-gate Hosted Monitoring runs that require /admin/v1/sources freshness evidence.

secrets.name: HOSTED_WORKER_EVIDENCE_MANIFEST_B64
secrets.next_operator_action: Store a reviewed hosted-worker evidence manifest as base64 after private freshness, retention, cadence, egress, and worker evidence refs are accepted.

secrets.name: HOSTED_MONITORING_EVIDENCE_MANIFEST_B64
secrets.next_operator_action: Store a reviewed hosted-monitoring evidence manifest as base64 after alert routing, scheduled checks, and ownership evidence are accepted.

secrets.name: LOCAL_SOURCE_REQUEST_DISPATCH_EVIDENCE_B64
secrets.next_operator_action: Optionally store a reviewed dispatch overlay as base64 to publish public-safe pending or overdue official request follow-up counts.
